content: Inno Setup PrivilegesRequired=lowest and NSIS RequestExecutionLevel user both produce installers that never trigger UAC elevation and correctly resolve %APPDATA% to the current non-admin user. Both are free, scriptable via CLI (ISCC.exe / makensis.exe) from a Node pipeline. Inno Setup has a more polished default wizard UI out of the box; NSIS is more minimal/compact and widely used by tools like electron-builder.
